credits: Riftspan Reaches sector was designed by Marc W. Miller and appears in Atlas of the Imperium (GDW, 1984). It was refined by James Holden and appears in The Travellers Digest.

allegiances.AsMw: Aslan Hierate, single multiple-world clan dominates
allegiances.AsSc: Aslan Hierate, multiple clans split control
